map[string]string{\n247\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"application/octet-stream\",\n248\t\t})\n249\t\tif err != nil {\n250\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"CreateMultipartUpload failed: %v\", err)\n251\t\t}\n252\t\n253\t\t// Upload parts\n254\t\tvar parts []CompletedPart\n255\t\tfor partNum := 0; partNum < numParts; partNum++ {\n256\t\t\tstart := partNum * partSize\n257\t\t\tend := start + partSize\n258\t\t\tif end > totalSize {\n259\t\t\t\tend = totalSize\n260\t\t\t}\n261\t\n262\t\t\tpartContent := uploadContent[start:end]\n263\t\t\tpartNum32 := int32(partNum + 1)\n264\t\n265\t\t\tetag, err := mb.UploadPart(ctx, bucket, key, uploadID, partNum32, bytes.NewReader(partContent), int64(len(partContent)))\n266\t\t\tif err != nil {\n267\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"UploadPart %d failed: %v\", partNum32, err)\n268\t\t\t}\n269\t\n270\t\t\tparts = append(parts, CompletedPart{\n271\t\t\t\tPartNumber: partNum32,\n272\t\t\t\tETag:        etag,\n273\t\t\t})\n274\t\n275\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Part %d: %d bytes (expected %d bytes for full part)\", partNum32, len(partContent), partSize)\n276\t\t}\n277\t\n278\t\t// Verify final part is smaller\n279\t\tfinalPartSize := len(uploadContent[2*partSize:])\n280\t\tif finalPartSize >= partSize {\n281\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Final part should be smaller than part size, got %d bytes\", finalPartSize)\n282\t\t}\n283\t\tt.Logf(\"Final part is non-aligned: %d bytes (< %d byte part size)\", finalPartSize, partSize)\n284\t\n285\t\t_, err = mb.CompleteMultipartUpload(ctx, bucket, key, uploadID, parts)\n286\t\tif err != nil {\n287\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"CompleteMultipartUpload failed: %v\", err)\n288\t\t}\n289\t\n290\t\t// Download and verify\n291\t\tbody, _, err := mb.Get(ctx, bucket, key)\n292\t\tif err != nil {\n293\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Get object failed: %v\", err)\n294\t\t}\n295\t\tdefer body.Close()\n296\t\n297\t\tdownloadedContent, err := io.ReadAll(body)\n298\t\tif err != nil {\n299\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to read downloaded content: %v\", err)\n300\t\t}\n301\t\n302\t\tif !bytes.Equal(downloadedContent, uploadContent) {\n303\t\t\tt.Error(\"Downloaded content does not match uploaded content for non-aligned final part\")\n304\t\t\treturn\n305\t\t}\n306\t\n307\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ Non-aligned final part verified: %d bytes\", len(downloadedContent))\n308\t\n309\t\t// Cleanup\n310\t\tmb.Delete(ctx, bucket, key)\n311\t}\n312\t\n313\t// TestMultipartUploadIrregularFinalPart tests a multipart upload where the final\n314\t// part is NOT a multiple of the standard part size (e.g., 5MB, 5MB, and 3MB).\n315\t// This is a common real-world scenario and tests an important edge case.\n316\tfunc TestMultipartUploadIrregularFinalPart(t *testing.T) {\n317\t\tif testing.Short() {\n318\t\t\tt.Skip(\"skipping integration test in short mode\")\n319\t\t}\n320\t\n321\t\tctx := context.Background()\n322\t\tbucket := \"test-armour-multipart\"\n323\t\tkey := \"test-multipart-irregular-final.dat\"\n324\t\tmb := newMockBackendForMultipart()\n325\t\n326\t\t// Test with 2 full 5MB parts plus a 3MB final part (13MB total)\n327\t\tconst partSize = 5 * 1024 * 1024 // 5MB per part\n328\t\ttotalSize := 13 * 1024 * 1024    // 13MB total (not a multiple of part size)\n329\t\tnumParts := 3\n330\t\n331\t\t// Create distinguishable content for each part using the same sophisticated\n332\t\t// patterns as TestMultipartUpload for better content verification\n333\t\tuploadContent := make([]byte, totalSize)\n334\t\tfor partNum := 0; partNum < numParts; partNum++ {\n335\t\t\tstart := partNum * partSize\n336\t\t\tend := start + partSize\n337\t\t\tif end > totalSize {\n338\t\t\t\tend = totalSize\n339\t\t\t}\n340\t\n341\t\t\t// Fill each part with a distinguishable pattern\n342\t\t\t// Part 0: 0x00, 0x01, 0x02, ...\n343\t\t\t// Part 1: 0xFF, 0xFE, 0xFD, ...\n344\t\t\t// Part 2 (final irregular part): 0xAA, 0x55, 0xAA, 0x55, ...\n345\t\t\tfor i := start; i < end; i++ {\n346\t\t\t\tswitch partNum {\n347\t\t\t\tcase 0:\n348\t\t\t\t\tuploadContent[i] = byte(i & 0xFF)\n349\t\t\t\tcase 1:\n350\t\t\t\t\tuploadContent[i] = 0xFF - byte(i&0xFF)\n351\t\t\t\tcase 2:\n352\t\t\t\t\tif (i-start)%2 == 0 {\n353\t\t\t\t\t\tuploadContent[i] = 0xAA\n354\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n355\t\t\t\t\t\tuploadContent[i] = 0x55\n356\t\t\t\t\t}\n357\t\t\t\t}\n358\t\t\t}\n359\t\t}\n360\t\n361\t\tt.Logf(\"Created test content: %d bytes, %d parts (final part irregular)\", totalSize, numParts)\n362\t\n363\t\t// Step 1: Create multipart upload\n364\t\tuploadID, err := mb.CreateMultipartUpload(ctx, bucket, key, map[string]string{\n365\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"application/octet-stream\",\n366\t\t\t\"test-name\":    \"TestMultipartUploadIrregularFinalPart\",\n367\t\t})\n368\t\tif err != nil {\n369\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"CreateMultipartUpload failed: %v\", err)\n370\t\t}\n371\t\tt.Logf(\"Created multipart upload: %s\", uploadID)\n372\t\n373\t\t// Step 2: Upload each part with distinguishable content\n374\t\tvar parts []CompletedPart\n375\t\tfor partNum := 0; partNum < numParts; partNum++ {\n376\t\t\tstart := partNum * partSize\n377\t\t\tend := start + partSize\n378\t\t\tif end > totalSize {\n379\t\t\t\tend = totalSize\n380\t\t\t}\n381\t\n382\t\t\tpartContent := uploadContent[start:end]\n383\t\t\tpartNum32 := int32(partNum + 1) // S3 part numbers are 1-indexed\n384\t\n385\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Uploading part %d: %d bytes (offset %d)\", partNum32, len(partContent), start)\n386\t\n387\t\t\tetag, err := mb.UploadPart(ctx, bucket, key, uploadID, partNum32, bytes.NewReader(partContent), int64(len(partContent)))\n388\t\t\tif err != nil {\n389\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"UploadPart %d failed: %v\", partNum32, err)\n390\t\t\t}\n391\t\n392\t\t\tparts = append(parts, CompletedPart{\n393\t\t\t\tPartNumber: partNum32,\n394\t\t\t\tETag:        etag,\n395\t\t\t})\n396\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Uploaded part %d: ETag=%s\", partNum32, etag)\n397\t\t}\n398\t\n399\t\t// Verify final part is smaller than standard part size\n400\t\tfinalPartSize := len(uploadContent[2*partSize:])\n401\t\tif finalPartSize >= partSize {\n402\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Final part should be smaller than part size, got %d bytes\", finalPartSize)\n403\t\t}\n404\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ Final part is irregular: %d bytes (< %d byte part size)\", finalPartSize, partSize)\n405\t\n406\t\t// Step 3: Complete multipart upload\n407\t\tfinalETag, err := mb.CompleteMultipartUpload(ctx, bucket, key, uploadID, parts)\n408\t\tif err != nil {\n409\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"CompleteMultipartUpload failed: %v\", err)\n410\t\t}\n411\t\tt.Logf(\"Completed multipart upload: final ETag=%s\", finalETag)\n412\t\n413\t\t// Step 4: Download the object and verify content\n414\t\tbody, info, err := mb.Get(ctx, bucket, key)\n415\t\tif err != nil {\n416\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Get object failed: %v\", err)\n417\t\t}\n418\t\tdefer body.Close()\n419\t\n420\t\tt.Logf(\"Downloaded object: ContentLength=%d, ETag=%s\", info.Size, info.ETag)\n421\t\n422\t\t// Verify ContentLength matches expected\n423\t\tif info.Size != int64(totalSize) {\n424\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"ContentLength mismatch: got %d, want %d\", info.Size, totalSize)\n425\t\t}\n426\t\n427\t\t// Read the full content\n428\t\tdownloadedContent, err := io.ReadAll(body)\n429\t\tif err != nil {\n430\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to read downloaded content: %v\", err)\n431\t\t}\n432\t\n433\t\t// Verify the downloaded content matches uploaded content byte-for-byte\n434\t\tif len(downloadedContent) != totalSize {\n435\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Downloaded content size mismatch: got %d bytes, want %d bytes\", len(downloadedContent), totalSize)\n436\t\t}\n437\t\n438\t\tif !bytes.Equal(downloadedContent, uploadContent) {\n439\t\t\t// Find where the mismatch occurs\n440\t\t\tmismatchOffset := -1\n441\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < len(downloadedContent) && i < len(uploadContent); i++ {\n442\t\t\t\tif downloadedContent[i] != uploadContent[i] {\n443\t\t\t\t\tmismatchOffset = i\n444\t\t\t\t\tbreak\n445\t\t\t\t}\n446\t\t\t}\n447\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Downloaded content mismatch at offset %d\", mismatchOffset)\n448\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected byte: 0x%02X, got: 0x%02X\", uploadContent[mismatchOffset], downloadedContent[mismatchOffset])\n449\t\n450\t\t\t// Print some context around the mismatch\n451\t\t\tcontextStart := mismatchOffset - 10\n452\t\t\tif contextStart < 0 {\n453\t\t\t\tcontextStart = 0\n454\t\t\t}\n455\t\t\tcontextEnd := mismatchOffset + 10\n456\t\t\tif contextEnd > len(downloadedContent) {\n457\t\t\t\tcontextEnd = len(downloadedContent)\n458\t\t\t}\n459\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Expected context: %v\", uploadContent[contextStart:contextEnd])\n460\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Got context:      %v\", downloadedContent[contextStart:contextEnd])\n461\t\t\treturn\n462\t\t}\n463\t\n464\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ Content verification passed: %d bytes match uploaded content\", len(downloadedContent))\n465\t\n466\t\t// Verify each part's distinguishable pattern\n467\t\tfor partNum := 0; partNum < numParts; partNum++ {\n468\t\t\tstart := partNum * partSize\n469\t\t\tend := start + partSize\n470\t\t\tif end > totalSize {\n471\t\t\t\tend = totalSize\n472\t\t\t}\n473\t\n474\t\t\tpartData := downloadedContent[start:end]\n475\t\t\tif !verifyPartPattern(partData, partNum, start) {\n476\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Part %d pattern verification failed\", partNum+1)\n477\t\t\t\treturn\n478\t\t\t}\n479\t\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ Part %d pattern verified (part %d: %d bytes)\", partNum+1, partNum+1, end-start)\n480\t\t}\n481\t\n482\t\t// Cleanup\n483\t\tif err := mb.Delete(ctx, bucket, key); err != nil {\n484\t\t\tt.Logf(\"Warning: failed to cleanup test object: %v\", err)\n485\t\t}\n486\t}\n487\t\n488\t// TestMultipartUploadSinglePart tests a \"multipart upload\" with only one part.\n489\t// This is technically a valid multipart upload and should work correctly.\n490\tfunc TestMultipartUploadSinglePart(t *testing.T) {\n491\t\tif testing.Short() {\n492\t\t\tt.Skip(\"skipping integration test in short mode\")\n493\t\t}\n494\t\n495\t\tctx := context.Background()\n496\t\tbucket := \"test-armour-multipart\"\n497\t\tkey := \"test-multipart-single-part.dat\"\n498\t\tmb := newMockBackendForMultipart()\n499\t\n500\t\t// Single part upload with 6MB data\n501\t\tdataSize := 6 * 1024 * 1024\n502\t\n503\t\tuploadContent := make([]byte, dataSize)\n504\t\tfor i := range uploadContent {\n505\t\t\tuploadContent[i] = byte(i & 0xFF)\n506\t\t}\n507\t\n508\t\tuploadID, err := mb.CreateMultipartUpload(ctx, bucket, key, map[string]string{\n509\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"application/octet-stream\",\n510\t\t})\n511\t\tif err != nil {\n512\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"CreateMultipartUpload failed: %v\", err)\n513\t\t}\n514\t\n515\t\t// Upload single part\n516\t\tetag, err := mb.UploadPart(ctx, bucket, key, uploadID, 1, bytes.NewReader(uploadContent), int64(len(uploadContent)))\n517\t\tif err != nil {\n518\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"UploadPart failed: %v\", err)\n519\t\t}\n520\t\n521\t\tparts := []CompletedPart{\n522\t\t\t{PartNumber: 1, ETag: etag},\n523\t\t}\n524\t\n525\t\t_, err = mb.CompleteMultipartUpload(ctx, bucket, key, uploadID, parts)\n526\t\tif err != nil {\n527\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"CompleteMultipartUpload failed: %v\", err)\n528\t\t}\n529\t\n530\t\t// Download and verify\n531\t\tbody, _, err := mb.Get(ctx, bucket, key)\n532\t\tif err != nil {\n533\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Get object failed: %v\", err)\n534\t\t}\n535\t\tdefer body.Close()\n536\t\n537\t\tdownloadedContent, err := io.ReadAll(body)\n538\t\tif err != nil {\n539\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to read downloaded content: %v\", err)\n540\t\t}\n541\t\n542\t\tif !bytes.Equal(downloadedContent, uploadContent) {\n543\t\t\tt.Error(\"Single-part multipart upload content mismatch\")\n544\t\t\treturn\n545\t\t}\n546\t\n547\t\tt.Logf(\"✓ Single-part multipart upload verified: %d bytes\", len(downloadedContent))\n548\t\n549\t\t// Cleanup\n550\t\tmb.Delete(ctx, bucket, key)\n551\t}\n552\t\n553\t// mockBackendForMultipart is a mock backend that actually stores data for testing.\n554\t// In production, this would be replaced with a real B2 backend.\n555\ttype mockBackendForMultipart struct {\n556\t\tobjects map[string][]byte\n557\t\tmeta    map[string]map[string]string\n558\t}\n559\t\n560\tfunc newMockBackendForMultipart() *mockBackendForMultipart {\n561\t\treturn &mockBackendForMultipart{\n562\t\t\tobjects: make(map[string][]byte),\n563\t\t\tmeta:    make(map[string]map[string]string),\n564\t\t}\n565\t}\n566\t\n567\tfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) CreateMultipartUpload(ctx context.Context, bucket, key string, meta map[string]string) (string, error) {\n568\t\tuploadID := fmt.Sprintf(\"upload-%d\", time.Now().UnixNano())\n569\t\treturn uploadID, nil\n570\t}\n571\t\n572\tfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) UploadPart(ctx context.Context, bucket, key, uploadID string, partNumber int32, body io.Reader, size int64) (string, error) {\n573\t\tdata, err := io.ReadAll(body)\n574\t\tif err != nil {\n575\t\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"failed to read part data: %w\", err)\n576\t\t}\n577\t\n578\t\t// Store the part data temporarily (in a real implementation, this would go to B2)\n579\t\tpartKey := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s.part.%d\", bucket, key, partNumber)\n580\t\tm.objects[partKey] = data\n581\t\n582\t\tetag := fmt.Sprintf(\"etag-%d-%s\", partNumber, uploadID[:8])\n583\t\treturn etag, nil\n584\t}\n585\t\n586\tfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) CompleteMultipartUpload(ctx context.Context, bucket, key, uploadID string, parts []CompletedPart) (string, error) {\n587\t\t// Combine all parts in order\n588\t\tvar combinedData []byte\n589\t\tfor _, part := range parts {\n590\t\t\tpartKey := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s.part.%d\", bucket, key, part.PartNumber)\n591\t\t\tpartData, ok := m.objects[partKey]\n592\t\t\tif !ok {\n593\t\t\t\treturn \"\", fmt.Errorf(\"part %d not found\", part.PartNumber)\n594\t\t\t}\n595\t\t\tcombinedData = append(combinedData, partData...)\n596\t\t\tdelete(m.objects, partKey) // Clean up part data\n597\t\t}\n598\t\n599\t\t// Store the combined object\n600\t\tfullKey := bucket + \"/\" + key\n601\t\tm.objects[fullKey] = combinedData\n602\t\tm.meta[fullKey] = map[string]string{\n603\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"application/octet-stream\",\n604\t\t\t\"upload-id\":    uploadID,\n605\t\t}\n606\t\n607\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"final-etag-%s\", uploadID[:8]), nil\n608\t}\n609\t\n610\tfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) AbortMultipartUpload(ctx context.Context, bucket, key, uploadID string) error {\n611\t\t// Clean up any uploaded parts\n612\t\tfor i := 1; i <= 10000; i++ { // Reasonable upper bound\n613\t\t\tpartKey := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s.part.%d\", bucket, key, i)\n614\t\t\tif _, ok := m.objects[partKey]; !ok {\n615\t\t\t\tbreak\n616\t\t\t}\n617\t\t\tdelete(m.objects, partKey)\n618\t\t}\n619\t\treturn nil\n620\t}\n621\t\n622\tfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) Get(ctx context.Context, bucket, key string) (io.ReadCloser, *ObjectInfo, error) {\n623\t\tfullKey := bucket + \"/\" + key\n624\t\tdata, ok := m.objects[fullKey]\n625\t\tif !ok {\n626\t\t\treturn nil, nil, fmt.Errorf(\"object not found: %s\", key)\n627\t\t}\n628\t\n629\t\tinfo := &ObjectInfo{\n630\t\t\tKey:  key,\n631\t\t\tSize: int64(len(data)),\n632\t\t\tMetadata: map[string]string{\n633\t\t\t\t\"Content-Type\": \"application/octet-stream\",\n634\t\t\t},\n635\t\t\tETag: m.meta[fullKey][\"upload-id\"],\n636\t\t}\n637\t\n638\t\treturn io.NopCloser(bytes.NewReader(data)), info, nil\n639\t}\n640\t\n641\tfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) Delete(ctx context.Context, bucket, key string) error {\n642\t\tfullKey := bucket + \"/\" + key\n643\t\tdelete(m.objects, fullKey)\n644\t\tdelete(m.meta, fullKey)\n645\t\treturn nil\n646\t}\n647\t\n648\t// Additional required backend interface methods (stubs for compilation)\n649\tfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) GetRange(ctx context.Context, bucket, key string, offset, length int64) (io.ReadCloser, error) {\n650\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"not implemented\")\n651\t}\n652\t\n653\tfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) GetRangeWithHeaders(ctx *mockBackendForMultipart) Head(ctx context.Context, bucket, key string) (*ObjectInfo, error) {\n658\t\tfullKey := bucket + \"/\" + key\n659\t\tdata, ok := m.objects[fullKey]\n660\t\tif !ok &mockBackendForMultipart{\n\t\tobjects: make(map[string][]byte),\n\t\tmeta:    make(map[string]map[string]string),\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) CreateMultipartUpload(ctx context.Context, bucket, key string, meta map[string]string) (string, error) {\n\tuploadID := fmt.Sprintf(\"upload-%d\", time.Now().UnixNano())\n\treturn uploadID, nil\n}\n\nfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) UploadPart(ctx context.Context, bucket, key, uploadID string, partNumber int32, body io.Reader, size int64) (string, error) {\n\tdata, err := io.ReadAll(body)\n\tif err != fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s.part.%d\", bucket, key, partNumber)\n\tm.objects[partKey] = data\n\n\tetag := fmt.Sprintf(\"etag-%d-%s\", partNumber, uploadID[:8])\n\treturn etag, nil\n}\n\nfunc (m *mockBackendForMultipart) CompleteMultipartUpload(ctx context.Context, bucket, key, uploadID string, parts []CompletedPart) (string, error) {\n\t// Combine all parts in order\n\tvar combinedData
